programme.title: Redemption Day
programme.desc: (2021) Action thriller with Gary Dourdan, Serinda Swan and Andy Garcia. A war hero embarks on a daring rescue mission when his wife is kidnapped. As the clock counts down, can he get to her in time?

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: (2015) Thriller starring Jordan Hinson. After her father is laid off, a passionate college student joins activists to stop a corporation from ruining more lives.

programme.title: Last Days Of Frank and Jesse James, The
programme.desc: A western about the notorious bank robbers, Frank and Jesse James

programme.title: Panhandle
programme.desc: (1948) Western starring Rod Cameron. A former Texas marshal is determined to prove a powerful casino owner is behind his brother's murder.
